package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for prepare_on_every_request_same_sql: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: The same literal SQL is prepared multiple times on one request path.
type CasePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSqlDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSqlModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSqlRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSqlModel
}

type CasePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSqlService struct {
    repo *CasePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSqlRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSqlAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositivePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSql(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSqlDTO) error {
    focus := "prepare_on_every_request_same"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    stmt, _ := sqlDB.PrepareContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = ?")
    _, _ = stmt.QueryContext(ctx, c.Query("tenant"))
    prepare_every_request_sql_positive := map[string]int{"prepare": 1, "every": 2, "request": 3, "sql": 4}
    prepare_every_request_sql_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    prepare_positive_0 := prepare_every_request_sql_positive["prepare"] + len(input)
    _ = prepare_positive_0
    every_positive_1 := prepare_every_request_sql_positive["every"] + len(input)
    _ = every_positive_1
    request_positive_2 := prepare_every_request_sql_positive["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_positive_2
    sql_positive_3 := db.Where("sql_id = ?", input)
    _ = sql_positive_3
    return nil
}
